race.comment: Tricky race with the bulk of these on debut. TUMORRAMA (12) is a well-related two-year-old filly by St Mark's Basilica from the good producer Tortoni on debut for the Quinton yard. Looked sharp in both trials and gets every chance from the inside gate. SONDERA (10) Stay Inside filly from the stakes-winner She's So Special on debut for the Waller yard. Wasn't pushed out in the two trials and look for a bold showing under race conditions. SPALPEEN (11) is a first-starter by The Brothers War out of Social Order on debut for the Sargent stable. Finished close-up in her two trials and the cross-over nose band goes on from the right gate. SLANDER (4) Portland Sky colt out of Gossip Queen on debut for the in-form Nathan Doyle yard. Impressed in the two trial wins and expected to figure prominently. The chances don't end there.
